description: Learning store for OKR cycle outcomes and calibration state. Records target vs actual for closed KRs to calibrate future target-setting.
_instructions: This store is populated automatically by the okr-learning-engine agent when a cycle is closed via /okr-retrospective. Each outcome entry records the cycle, KR metric_id, planned target, actual value, and classification (hit/partial/miss). The metric_priors object accumulates Bayesian priors per metric for target calibration. Do not edit manually unless correcting a known data error.
